narrative: Machine Learning Engineer at Meta with six years of experience, currently based in Coimbatore. Strong verified skill depth—demonstrated by deep work with TensorFlow, NLP pipelines, and vector‑search tools such as pgvector, Weaviate and LlamaIndex—propelled the ranking. The candidate’s breadth of technical skills, including scikit‑learn, aligns well with the senior AI/ML search and retrieval focus, and their product‑company background adds relevance for a product‑first team. However, limited platform engagement and minor profile credibility concerns, plus an unknown notice period and distance from the Pune/Noida hub, temper the overall fit.
